title: The Awakening of Lumina-7 — Single-Word Answers
description: Tests intent detection, context retrieval precision, and concise answer synthesis. All answers must be single-word or Yes/No.

questions.input: If Kaelen Voss were stranded in the technology-free wasteland of the Frozen Abyss, would his city-linked neural implants help him survive? Answer with a single word.
During the Primordial Resonance earthquakes, would Commander Vex prioritize rescuing Dr. Elara Vance over securing the Flux Core? Answer Yes or No.
Was the dense vertical architecture of Aura-City a tactical advantage for Kaelen while evading drones during the quakes? One word only.
Name the single character whose Quartz Desert extraction operations would become entirely pointless if the Flux Core had been buried under the obelisk in the Frozen Abyss instead. One word.
